description: SunPass services focus on documenting solar systems, helping homeowners understand their solar equipment, and supporting solar system transitions during real estate transactions.

brand.name: SunPass
brand.short_description: SunPass provides professional solar system documentation, inspection, and homeowner support services.
brand.core_idea: Most solar systems lack clear documentation and understanding. SunPass exists to document solar systems and help people understand what they have.

primary_audiences: Home buyers purchasing homes with solar

core_services.name: Solar System Documentation
core_services.description: SunPass documents the components and configuration of an installed solar system so homeowners and buyers clearly understand the system.
value: Creates a clear record of the solar system
Helps homeowners understand what equipment they have
Provides useful documentation during real estate transactions

core_services.name: Pre Sale Solar Inspection
core_services.description: A solar focused inspection designed for homes preparing to go on the market.
includes: documentation report for agents and buyers
value: Reduces uncertainty during the home sale process
Provides solar information early in the transaction

core_services.name: Solar Transfer Support
core_services.description: Assistance with the transition of a solar system from seller to buyer during a home sale.
includes: guidance on warranty transfer steps when applicable
guidance on monitoring setup for the new homeowner
value: Makes solar easier to transfer during escrow
Helps buyers understand what system they are inheriting

core_services.name: Inverter Monitoring Reconnection
core_services.description: After a home sale, SunPass can help reconnect the solar monitoring system to the new homeowner's internet.
value: Helps new homeowners confirm their system is operating

existing_homeowner_services.description: SunPass also supports homeowners who already have solar but want help understanding their system.
common_homeowner_questions: How many panels do I have?
What brand of panels are installed?
How big is my solar system?
Why is my system producing less power?
existing_homeowner_services.customer_friendly_explanation: Many homeowners inherit solar systems with very little documentation. SunPass helps identify and document the system so the homeowner understands what equipment they have.

relationship_to_sunsweeper.description: SunPass and SunSweeper work together but serve different roles.
relationship_to_sunsweeper.sunsweeper_role: SunSweeper performs the physical cleaning and maintenance services such as solar panel cleaning and roof cleaning.
relationship_to_sunsweeper.sunpass_role: SunPass focuses on documenting solar systems and helping people understand their solar equipment.

key_points: Provides clear solar system documentation for listings
Helps real estate agents answer buyer questions about solar
Reduces confusion around solar equipment during escrow

important_notes: SunPass does not install solar systems.
SunPass does not sell solar systems.
SunPass documents and helps explain existing solar systems.
